name: Jakou
description: Jakou is a thief that stole some treasure from a daimyō's sister.     ~!He, along with his group of bandits that were traveling with treasure stolen from the daimyō's sister. The treasure was later recovered by Naruto Uzumaki and Sasuke Uchiha, who later defeated him and his team. !~    Debut: Naruto Shippūden Episode #194
